bns:Component.folderFullPath: acct-sandbox/zDevelopment/DevOne/Walls Cloud- Starting processes/Client Walls (APIServices + Cloud)
bns:Component.name: [Client Walls] Process Properties

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Check the box to run the Main Client Matters process
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Main

definedProcessProperty.helpText: If an error occurs, do you want to suppress it, and continue with other processing or halt.
definedProcessProperty.label: Continue on Process Errors in Walls Main

definedProcessProperty.helpText: These processes support CDS or SQL db
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Source System

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Test load: process executes for 5 records only; Full load: full sync from the source system; Incremental: retrieves updates of users after certain date.
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Load Type

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Check the box to run the process
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Users

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Check the box to run the process
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Clients

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Check the box to run the process
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Matters

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This is used for GET operations
definedProcessProperty.label: CDS Batch Limit

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Set the string to be appended to userId as the WindowsNetworkLogon value. Example: 'tenantName\'
definedProcessProperty.label: Walls Users_WindowsNetworkLogon string

definedProcessProperty.helpText: Subtract the number of days from this date and returns the new date. This is used for Incremental Loads
definedProcessProperty.label: CDS Look Back X Days

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This setting will controls the behavior of copying the sql from the cross reference into the cache. Increase if the number of rows in your reference is greater than default
definedProcessProperty.label: Max SQL Cross Reference Values

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This is the CDS API Application name. Default is WALLS-ON-PREMISE-AGENT
definedProcessProperty.label: CDS Client ID

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This is the CDS API Application Client Secret
definedProcessProperty.label: CDS Application Secret

definedProcessProperty.helpText: If the implementation is using the Net Docs Extension, change this to Yes. Note. make sure you review the process documentation before switching this to Yes.
definedProcessProperty.label: Include NetDocs Data
